title: jml498/RNAeditingOffTarget: Release V1.0 - RNA Editing Off-Target Identification Toolkit
author: jml498
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This release marks the first official version of the RNA Editing Off-Target Identification Toolkit. It includes key scripts for analyzing RNA-seq data, identifying off-target editing events, and filtering out common events between control and experimental samples. This toolkit provides a solid foundation for researchers to conduct comprehensive off-target RNA editing analyses.
steps_raw: This release marks the first official version of the RNA Editing Off-Target Identification Toolkit. It includes key scripts for analyzing RNA-seq data, identifying off-target editing events, and filtering out common events between control and experimental samples. This toolkit provides a solid foundation for researchers to conduct comprehensive off-target RNA editing analyses.
